notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Javier Sanoja reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Hyeseong Kim. Otto Lopez scores. Xavier Edwards to 3rd. Agustín Ramírez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Javier Sanoja reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Hyeseong Kim. Otto Lopez scores. Xavier Edwards to 3rd. Agustín Ramírez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Alex Call pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Alex Call singles on a ground ball to right fielder Owen Caissie.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Rojas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Rojas challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Miguel Rojas called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Dalton Rushing pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dalton Rushing walks. Andy Pages to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Tucker walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Tucker singles on a line drive to center fielder Jakob Marsee. Dalton Rushing scores. Shohei Ohtani scores. Freddie Freeman to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Stowers GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Stowers grounds into a double play, second baseman Alex Freeland to shortstop Hyeseong Kim to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Jakob Marsee out at 2nd. Kyle Stowers out at 1st.
